heroTitle: Buy & Sell Verified Electronics with Confidence
heroSubtitle: The trusted marketplace powered by AI-driven verification and secure escrow payments.
step1Description: Explore thousands of electronics from verified sellers worldwide, all in one place.
step2Description: Negotiate directly with sellers or buy instantly at listed prices.
step3Description: Pay with confidence. Funds are held in escrow until you confirm receipt.
step4Description: Get your device shipped and inspected. Release payment only when you're satisfied.
trustDescription: Every device is verified and every transaction is protected by escrow.
aiDescription: Our AI detects fraud, verifies listings, and recommends the best deals for you.
verifiedDevicesDescription: All devices undergo rigorous checks to ensure they match their descriptions.
securePaymentsDescription: Escrow protection ensures your money is safe until you receive what you ordered.
supportDescription: Our dedicated support team is available around the clock to help with any issues.
downloadAppDescription: Get the full marketplace experience on iOS and Android.
newsletterDescription: Get the latest deals, product drops, and marketplace news delivered to your inbox.
footerDescription: The world's most trusted marketplace for verified electronics.
